title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph, Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs. The system consists of four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and response synthesis.
